presentation.chiefComplaint: Cut on the forearm from a kitchen knife, still bleeding a little

history.hpi: Slipped while cutting vegetables an hour ago and sustained a 4 cm linear laceration to the volar left forearm. Bleeding controlled with pressure. Full sensation and movement of the hand and fingers, no foreign body sensation.
redFlags: Confirm distal neurovascular and tendon function intact

expert.esiRationale: Simple laceration with controlled bleeding and intact neurovascular/tendon function. One expected resource (laceration repair / sutures). One resource with stable vitals -> ESI 4.

provenance.sourceRef: ED Triage Trainer hand-authored seed case
